title: DBM-SI / ASI / FTI / PDS / CG Review and Outlook: A Structural Intelligence Tech Stack and Grand Map
description: This repository presents a unified review and outlook of the DBM-SI structural intelligence ecosystem, including ASI, FTI, PDS, CGCCC, Elastic IR, and related structural-runtime frameworks. The work consolidates foundational algorithms, frontier architectures, and future research directions involving metric-space intelligence, CCC extraction, policy-controlled runtime systems, tunnel-preserved evolution, autonomous coding governance, and structural intelligence systems. The repository proposes that future AI systems may require structural control planes layered above generative models, enabling policy separation, trajectory stabilization, CCC-preserved derivation, and structurally auditable autonomous systems.
